SQLLite.SQL: SELECT c.name || ' (' || w.court_code || ')' AS "GroupingCourt" , w.export_date AS "ExportDate" , w.filename AS "Filename" , rq.document_id AS "DocumentId" FROM wft_exports w, courts c, report_queue rq WHERE (w.court_code = ${param.courtCode} OR w.court_code IN (SELECT c2.wft_grouping_court FROM courts c2 WHERE c2.dm_court_code = ${param.courtCode} )) AND c.code = w.court_code AND rq.id = w.report_queue_id ORDER BY 2 DESC, 3

Security.roles: high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
